The mutation p.R175H is a missense mutation classified as possibly impactful [tool:mutation_effect].

### Mutation Analysis
The mutation involves a single amino acid substitution at position 175, where Arginine (R) is replaced by Histidine (H) [tool:mutation_effect]. This change is categorized as a missense mutation with a medium severity rating [tool:mutation_effect]. Notably, the substitution is flagged for an aromatic gain/loss [tool:mutation_effect]. Based on rule-based heuristics, the overall assessment of this mutation is that it is possibly impactful [tool:mutation_effect].
